title: Missing the School Bus 错过校车
scene: Sam起床晚了，错过了校车，需要想办法去学校。

lines.en: Dad! I missed the school bus! What do I do?
lines.zh: 爸爸！我错过校车了！怎么办？

lines.en: How late are you? What time is it now?
lines.zh: 你晚了多久？现在几点了？

lines.en: It is seven thirty. The bus left at seven fifteen.
lines.zh: 七点半了。校车七点一刻就走了。

lines.en: Do not panic. I can drive you to school.
lines.zh: 别慌。我可以开车送你去学校。

lines.en: Will we make it in time for class?
School starts at eight. We have thirty minutes.
lines.zh: 八点上课。我们还有三十分钟。

lines.en: I am sorry, Dad. I overslept this morning.
lines.zh: 对不起爸爸。我今早睡过头了。

lines.en: It is OK. Set two alarms tonight so it does not happen again.
lines.zh: 没关系。今晚定两个闹钟，免得再发生。

lines.en: I will. Thank you for driving me.
lines.zh: 我会的。谢谢你开车送我。

lines.en: Let us go! Grab your bag and hurry!
